raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jekantju Jojakima
Dehlu/ to Kehnixu no Juha/
un wiſſus Aiswestus no Juha/
kas uhs Babeli irr nahkſchi/
atweddifchu es uhs fcho Weetu/
fakka tas KUNGS: Jo es fa-
lausifchu to Juhgu ta Kehnixa
no Babeles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Praweets
Jeremijus uhs to Praweetu Ka-
nantju/ preekſch to Preesteru/ un
wiſſu Lauschu Azzim/ kas tur
ſtahweja eekſch ta KUNGA
Namuna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Praweets Jeremi-
jus fazzija: Amen. Lai tas
KUNGS ta darra/ lai tas
tas KUNGS tawus Wahrdus ap-
ſtiprina/ ko tu effi fluddinajs /
la winſch atwed tohs Rihkus ta
Deewa Namna/ un wiſſus
Aiswestus no Babeles attat us
ſcho Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr klaufi jelle tcho
Wahrdn/ko es runnaſchun preekſch
tawahn Aufin/ un preekſch
wiſſu Lauschu Aufin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Praweeschi/ kas
preekſch mannis/ un vreekſch te-
wis irr bijuschi muhscham/
tee
irr prett dauds Semnehm /
un
leelahm Walstibahm fluddinaj-
fchi no Karra/ un no Nelaimi-
bas/ un no Mehra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Praweets/ kas
Meeru fluddina/ tas pats Pra-
weets taps atſihts/ka tas KUNGS
winnu irr teefcham fuhtijs/ kad
tas Wahrdg tam Praweetam
nahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme tas Praweets
Kanantjus to Juhgu no ta Pra-
weeta Jeremijus Rakla/ un fa-
lause to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Kanantjus runnaja
preekſch wiſſu Lauschu Azzim/
un fazzija: Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Tapatt falausifchu es to Juhgu
NebukadNezara/ ta Kehnixa no
Babeles/ pirns diwi Gaddi pa
Gallam buhs/ no ta Rakla wiſ-
fu Lauschu. Un tas Praweets
Jeremijus gabje fawn Zettu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad notikte ta KUNGA
Wahrdg uhs Jeremiju/ pehz ka
Kanantjus tas Praweets to Juh-
gu bii falausis no ta Prawee-
ta Jeremijus Rakla/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eij/ un runna uhs Kana-
ntju/ un fakki: Ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Kohka Juhgu eſti
tu lausis/ bet winnu Weeta dar-
riſchu es Dſelses Juhgus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaoth/ tas Ifraeta Deews:
Weenu Dſelses Juhgu efmu es
wiſſeem ſcheem Laudim ap Rakla
lizzis/ ka teem buhs kalpoht Ne-
bukadNezaram tam Kehnixaim
no Babeles/ un teem buhs win-
nam kalpoht/ jo ir tohs Sweh-
rus Lauka efmu es winnam de-
wis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Praweets Jere-
mijus fazzija uhs to Praweetu
Kanantju: Klaust jelle Kanani-
jus: Tas KUNGS tewi ne irr
tuhtijs/ un tu effi darrijs/ ka
ſchee Landis uhs Melleem pa-
laischahs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
